title: Officially, Marco Rubio is still banned from China. So how is he in Beijing?
summary_full: Chinese officials are using a different transliterated character for the secretary of state's name, perhaps to allow him to visit without lifting a 2020 ban.
summary_public: Chinese officials are using a different transliterated character for the secretary of state's name, perhaps to allow him to visit without lifting a 2020 ban.
